data.content: 1. The branch fails bunx tsc --noEmit in src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts. 2. That file still contains unresolved merge conflict markers at lines 356-415, so the review state is not valid for approval. 3. The targeted fix in src/app/beats/page.tsx appears to produce Agent: Claude and Model: Opus for claude-opus-4-6, and src/app/beats/__tests__/page-active-agent-info.test.ts covers that regression, but approval is blocked until the unrelated breakage is cleaned up and gates pass.
